title: Towow vNext Evidence Packet
description: Canonical shape of a completion / verification evidence packet. Every evidence file under .towow/evidence/<run-id>/ MUST validate against this schema. Referenced by ../hooks/verify-gate.py. Addresses Phase 1 §2.7 / §3.1 / open-question A.7 (no explicit completion-evidence artifact existed). Grounded in Phase 2 §4.4 (PRM) and §3.8 (closure = commit + packet).

packet_id.description: sha256 of the canonical-JSON serialization of this packet with digest omitted.

step_id.description: Stable per-step identifier: step number or sub-task id. For run-level packets (MERGE_READY), use 'FINAL'.

kind.description: step = per-edit evidence; gate = mode-transition gate; merge_ready = run-level completion; retire = asset retirement packet.

id.description: model name, hook script path, or human user id

claims.description: What the author says was accomplished. Plain strings.

evidence.description: Concrete substantiation per claim. Every claim must have ≥1 matching evidence entry.

ref.description: commit sha / test name / file path / url / attestation id

blockers.description: Known issues that should block closure at the current mode. Empty = no blockers declared.

unknowns.description: Explicit UNKNOWNs the author cannot resolve. Surfacing them here is required — silent omission is a verify-gate fail (Phase 1 §6.1 affordance failure).

predecessors.description: packet_ids this packet builds on (forms the run's evidence DAG).
